titleStmt.title: SII 22.433: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 433. (A.R. No. 433 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, SRIVAIKUNTHAM TALUK, MURAPPANĀḌU. VĒDANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE TRIBH. KOṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ

summary.p: This inscription is also mutilated and incomplete. It states that a piece of land at Murappu-nāḍu alias Sōmidēva-chaturvēdimaṅgalam which had been assigned as kārāṇmai to Āli Villavadaraiyaṉ of Vaḻugūr with the kaḍamai thereon being paid to the (Śiva) temple of Yōgīśvaram-uḍaiyār at the place was transferred by Vēṇāḍuḍaiyāṉ without the consent of the former, to the temple of Vēdanāyaka-viṇṇagar-āḻvār. As compensation for the same, Vēṇāḍuḍaiyār now purchased (3/4) vēli and one mā of land at Maṇakkuḍi, the eastern hamlet of Śrīvallabhamaṅgalam, and made it over as kārāṇmai to Villavadaraiyar and the kaḍamai to the Āḻvār temple. This is evidently the same land that is mentioned in No. 431 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti k[o *ṉeriṉmaiko]ṇṭāṉ murappu nāṭāṉa somidevaccaturvedimaṅkalattu vetanāyakaviṇṇakarāḻvār koyil nampu ceyvārkaḷukkum śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum somidevaccaturvedimaṅkalam piṭicūḻkiṟa pe
ṟṟil vaḻukūruṭaiyā ṉāli villavataraiyaṉ kāṇiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilam nālumāvum niṅkalākap piṭicūḻntu Innilam villavataraiyaṉukku kārāṇmaiyum Ivvūr yogiśvaramuṭaiyāṟkuk kaṭamaiyumākat tirune
yār koyilile kallum veṭṭi Ikkalveṭṭiṉpaṭi kaṭamaiyiṟut taṉupavit tup potacceyte yinnilattai veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ Ivvillavataraiyaṉaik keḷāte yivaṉ kārāṇmaiyai Inta Āḻvāṟku nirvārttu Innilattukku pratikṣe
ḷakkūṟṟattu śrīvallavamaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai maṇakkuṭip puṟakaraiyil veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ vilaikoṇṭu Ivvillavataraiyaṉukkuk kārāṇmaiyum Inta veta nāyaka viṇṇakarāḻvārkkuk kaṭamaiyumākac cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolā liṭṭa nilam
nila mukkāle yorumāvukku tirunelveliyuṭaiyār koyil kalveṭṭiṉ paṭi kaṭamai payir pāṟtup payirkkoṇṭa nilattukku māttāl kalaṉetūṇippatakku nellu maraimāvaraik kāṇiyc campūvaḻi yiṟuttu nampu ceyvārkaḷum śrīvaiṣṇavar kaiyāl (īncomplete)
Digital edition of SII 22.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
